queries.question: List the parameter units for every weather model.
queries.sql: SELECT Parameters.unit  from Weather_Model_Parameters join Parameters on Weather_Model_Parameters.parameterId = Parameters.parameterID join Weather_Model on Weather_Model_Parameters.weatherModelId = Weather_Model.modelID   GROUP BY Weather_Model_Parameters.parameterId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Weather_Model_Parameters.weatherModelId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Weather_Model)

queries.question: List the parameter units for every weather model.
queries.sql: select weather_model.modelname , parameters.unit from Weather_Model_Parameters join Parameters on Weather_Model_Parameters.parameterId = Parameters.parameterID join Weather_Model on Weather_Model_Parameters.weatherModelId = Weather_Model.modelID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?modelname ?unit WHERE {
  ?weather_model_parameters a :Weather_Model_Parameters .
  ?parameters a :Parameters .
  ?weather_model_parameters p:hasParameters ?parameters .
  ?weather_model a :Weather_Model .
  ?weather_model_parameters p:hasWeather_Model ?weather_model .
  ?weather_model p:modelName ?modelname .
  ?parameters p:unit ?unit .
}

queries.question: What metric and unit is used by every single weather model?
queries.sql: SELECT Parameters.parameterName, Parameters.unit  from Weather_Model_Parameters join Parameters on Weather_Model_Parameters.parameterId = Parameters.parameterID join Weather_Model on Weather_Model_Parameters.weatherModelId = Weather_Model.modelID   GROUP BY Weather_Model_Parameters.parameterId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Weather_Model_Parameters.weatherModelId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Weather_Model)

queries.question: For every weather model, list the parameters that are used.
queries.sql: select weather_model.modelname , parameters.parametername from Weather_Model_Parameters join Parameters on Weather_Model_Parameters.parameterId = Parameters.parameterID join Weather_Model on Weather_Model_Parameters.weatherModelId = Weather_Model.modelID

queries.question: For every weather model what metrics and units are there?
queries.sql: select weather_model.modelname , parameters.parametername , parameters.unit from Weather_Model_Parameters join Parameters on Weather_Model_Parameters.parameterId = Parameters.parameterID join Weather_Model on Weather_Model_Parameters.weatherModelId = Weather_Model.modelID

queries.question: Show me the parameters each weather model uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Parameters.parameterName  from Weather_Model_Parameters join Parameters on Weather_Model_Parameters.parameterId = Parameters.parameterID join Weather_Model on Weather_Model_Parameters.weatherModelId = Weather_Model.modelID   GROUP BY Weather_Model_Parameters.parameterId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Weather_Model_Parameters.weatherModelId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Weather_Model)
